notes: Small UI sharpness patch for V1.0.7.1.
Sharpened dashboard cards, navigation buttons, and Health Center panels.
Reduced heavy blur shadows so borders and text read cleaner.
Improved contrast on Health Check and Broken Link Center controls.
No workflow, Work folder, settings, or cache behavior is changed.
No Setup wizard is shown during in-app silent updates and SA CHECK stays closed after update.
No user Work folders, settings, or cache are cleared by this update.
